caption: A woman with blonde-tipped hair tied up in a bun, wearing black over-ear headphones and a black t-shirt, sits in a recording studio. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone and looks slightly to her left. Behind her is a white wall with a yellow vertical stripe and a black panel. A screen in the background displays the word "Johnson" in red letters, accompanied by text that reads "Employee Only". Across the bottom of the scene, logos are visible, including a circular "PODCAST" emblem and the text "BOSS TALK 101" next to a graphic of a microphone and the smaller phrase "By 11 Logo Studio". As the sequence progresses, the woman maintains her position and expression, though her facial muscles shift slightly and she blinks, indicating a moment of listening or reacting during a conversation.
